question_text:
Your local newspaper is running a creative writing competition.

Either:
Write a description of a storm at sea as suggested by this picture:

![](questions/images/english_07__fig1.png)

or
Write a story about an unexpected visitor.
markscheme:
========================================
ASSESSMENT OBJECTIVES
========================================

AO5: Content and Organisation (24 marks)
Communicate clearly, effectively and imaginatively, selecting and adapting tone, style and register for different forms, purposes and audiences.
Organise information and ideas, using structural and grammatical features to support coherence and cohesion of texts.

AO6: Technical Accuracy (16 marks)
Use a range of vocabulary and sentence structures for clarity, purpose and effect, with accurate spelling and punctuation.

========================================
MARKING APPROACH
========================================

• Mark AO5 and AO6 separately
• AO5 focuses on content quality and organisation
• AO6 focuses on technical accuracy (SPaG)
• Use best-fit approach across the level descriptors
• Reward ambitious, creative responses even if technically imperfect

========================================
LEVEL DESCRIPTORS
========================================

AO5 Content and Organisation
Communicate clearly, effectively and imaginatively, selecting and adapting tone, style and register for different forms, purposes and audiences.
Organise information and ideas, using structural and grammatical features to support coherence and cohesion of texts.

AO6 Technical Accuracy
Students are assessed on their ability to use a range of vocabulary and sentence structures for clarity, purpose and effect, with accurate spelling and punctuation.
